title: Average formula
excerpt:
Hi everyone, 
Do you know if we can use Average formula with date from other columns ? 
It seems that to work only with numeric values entered manually in the formula. 
Thanks, 
Corentin

posts.cookedHtml:

It looks like the columns that you want to average might also formula columns. Can you confirm? If so, please share one of the formulas.

Thanks for your help anyway,

Corentin
